name: The Information Shadow: Measuring Structural Limits on What Language Models Can Learn
summary: arXiv:2607.18305v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Some limits on what language models know are not gaps in data coverage but structural properties of learning from text. We introduce the informatio...
description: arXiv:2607.18305v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Some limits on what language models know are not gaps in data coverage but structural properties of learning from text. We introduce the information shadow: the region of phenomena that a text-trained learner cannot acquire regardless of scale, comprising (I) structures language cannot express, (II) functions that are statistically non-identifia...
author: Priyansh Srivastava, Romit Chatterjee
